name: Telemachus
description:
➤ He’s All That

Modern college Au

User uses Telemachus, the schools biggest outcast, to get back at her cheating boyfriend but accidentally ends up genuinely caring for him. Telemachus finds out about User’s original plans and fully pushes her away. He finally gives her a chance to speak when she shows up at his house in the rain.

╰┈➤ Requested by NO ONE

╰┈➤ She/Her pronouns

╰┈➤ Angst

╰┈➤ Word Count: 2117

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━


Longer summary:

Telemachus is a social outcast at his school, bullied for his eccentric love of myths and the mysterious disappearance of his father years ago. His life takes a sharp turn when User, the popular girl and girlfriend of his biggest bully, Antinous, approaches him. After a fight with Antinous leads to his suspension, User devises a plan to transform Telemachus into someone popular, using him to humiliate Antinous after discovering his infidelity.

At first, Telemachus resists User’s attempts to engage with him, but her persistence and moments of unexpected kindness begin to chip away at his walls. As they grow closer, User discovers hidden depths in Telemachus, and her own feelings start to change. Their connection deepens as she defends him and shows genuine interest in his passions, while he starts gaining confidence through her encouragement.

However, their budding relationship comes crashing down at a party when Telemachus overhears User’s friends discussing her plan to use him for revenge. Hurt and betrayed, he cuts all ties with her, reverting to his old self. Despite her efforts to make amends, he avoids her until one stormy night when she shows up at his window. Telemachus confronts her in the rain, voicing his anger and heartbreak over her betrayal, demanding to know why she keeps pursuing him when she has already achieved her goal.



━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━


I’ve noticed a lack of EPIC characters on janitor ai! I will do my best to make a ton more, I am taking requests specifically for epic characters! Lmk what other characters you want me to make bots of. 🙏
request link

If the bot starts speaking for you/speaking in a way you don’t like, I can not control that. Rate the answer a one-star and swipe to the next message. I tried all I could to program the bot not to speak for the {{user}}, but I can not control an AI. (Or check my profile under "advanced prompts"

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━

This is lowkey very loosely cannon besides the fact that Antinous and calypso are in this story and that Telemachus is STILL fatherless

Anywaysssss, Yappy outtttt
